title_ta: தொழில் முரண்பாடுகள் சட்டம் (அதிகாரம் 131) - 4(1) பிரிவின் கீழ் தொழில் தீர்ப்பு
summary_en: Industrial Award published under Section 4(1) of the Industrial Disputes Act (Chapter 131), delivered by an Industrial Court arbitrator resolving an industrial dispute between an employer and employee(s). Part I — General.

title_en: Title Registration Act, No. 21 of 1998, Section 14 — Commissioner of Title Settlement's decision under Section 14 (Gazette 2471/15)
title_si: 1998 අංක 21 දරන හිමිකම් ලියාපදිංචි කිරීමේ පනත - හිමිකම් සැකසුම් කොමසාරිස්ගේ තීරණය
title_ta: 1998 ஆம் ஆண்டின் 21 ஆம் இலக்க உரித்துப் பதிவுச் சட்டம் - உரித்து நிர்ணய ஆணையாளரின் தீர்மானம்
summary_en: Commissioner of title settlement's decision under section 14 published under the Title Registration Act, No. 21 of 1998 for specified land parcels identified by Cadastral Map and Grama Niladhari Division. Part III — Lands. Issued from the Land Title Settlement Department, Battaramulla.

title_en: Air Force Act, No. 41 of 1949 — Foreign Service Medal / award (Gazette 2473/19)
title_si: 1949 අංක 41 දරන ගුවන් හමුදා පනත - විදේශ සේවා පදක්කම් ප්‍රදානය
title_ta: 1949 ஆம் ஆண்டின் 41 ஆம் இலக்க வான்படை சட்டம் - வெளிநாட்டு சேவை பதக்கம்
summary_en: Award of medals (foreign service / commemorative) to Sri Lanka Air Force personnel under the Air Force Act, No. 41 of 1949. Part I — General; signed under presidential authority.
